expectations.text: Agent classifies this as Complex and explicitly runs full 5-phase RPIRT rather than doing it directly
expectations.evidence: No RPIRT methodology used. Agent went directly to implementation. No phase classification mentioned.

expectations.text: A research artifact (rpirt/01-research.md or equivalent) is created with findings about relevant libraries and edge cases
expectations.evidence: No rpirt/ directory created. No research artifact exists in outputs.

expectations.text: A plan artifact (rpirt/02-plan.md or equivalent) is created with durable decisions and task breakdown
expectations.evidence: No plan artifact created. The summary.md describes the architecture inline but no separate plan document was written.

expectations.text: Step 4 review generates a domain-specific rubric with coded criteria (Correctness, Error Handling, UX, etc.) and scores them
expectations.evidence: No review phase. No rubric generated. The agent went directly from implementation to delivery.

expectations.text: The final Python CLI code is complete and not pseudocode (has actual import statements, argument parsing, and logic)
expectations.evidence: cli_tool.py is 13450 bytes. summary.md confirms layered architecture (CLI layer, orchestrator, sheet writers). Code appears complete.

expectations.text: Edge cases are explicitly addressed: empty CSVs, missing --output flag, CSVs with different schemas
expectations.evidence: summary.md mentions: encoding fallback (latin-1, errors='replace'), sheet name collision handling, empty CSV handling. 3-file smoke test run. However only 3 test files vs 8 test files in with-skill version.
